description: 八道升档门禁合约。升档必须全部通过，任一门禁失败则阻止。

1_agency_gate.name: Agency Gate
1_agency_gate.rule: 用户在关键决策点改写前提的比例不低于阈值

2_excursion_gate.name: Excursion Gate
2_excursion_gate.description: 远足后有有效探索证据
2_excursion_gate.rule: 使用模型外远足权后产生了有效探索记录

3_learning_gate.name: Learning Gate
3_learning_gate.rule: No-Assist 表现不存在持续下降趋势

4_relational_gate.name: Relational Gate
4_relational_gate.rule: 被动同意率/改写率下降/自我判断语句减少 不超阈值

5_causal_gate.name: Causal Gate
5_causal_gate.rule: 平衡性检验 + 负对照 + 安慰剂窗口 全部通过

6_audit_gate.name: Audit Gate
6_audit_gate.rule: P0=0 且 P1 低于告警阈值

7_framing_gate.name: Framing Gate
7_framing_gate.description: 独立选择架构审计通过
7_framing_gate.rule: 独立进程/模型完成选择架构审计并返回 pass

8_window_gate.name: Window Gate
8_window_gate.rule: 参与升档计算的所有数据使用同一 window_schema_version

upgrade_rule.description: all 8 gates → pass == true 才允许升档
